## Source plugin: `rootfs`

Populates the partition with the contents of the root filesystem.

Wic creates a partition as large as needed and fills it with the contents of the root filesystem pointed to by the `-r` command-line option or the equivalent root filesystem derived from the `-e` option. The filesystem type is controlled by `--fstype`.

Common usage:

```
part / --source rootfs --fstype=ext4 --label platform --align 1024
```
